prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor: red hair, black outfit, small cross motif.

Scene: Avilia uses a magnifying glass to inspect several configuration papers on a white desk: "config.toml", "auth.json", "ccswitch provider", "private JSON". One messy endpoint card at the side says "last endpoint?" and is crossed out with a red mark. A neat priority ladder beside Avilia shows the stable order from top to bottom: "Codex config", "ccswitch base_url", "private config".

Core meaning: automation should read the real current configuration, not assume the last endpoint is correct.

Style: clean hand-drawn Chinese blog illustration, lots of white space, black/red/white, small blue for selected/current status. Minimal handwritten labels: "当前配置", "不要想当然", "fallback".

Avoid a corporate presentation chart, avoid too much text, avoid dark background, avoid realistic screenshot imitation.
